daily.today_energy: Your intuitive antenna is ON today, Pisces. Trust those subtle nudges guiding you toward people and spaces that actually vibe with your energy. It's giving selective queen energy.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than they let on. Whether it's a crush or your ride-or-die, today's the day to lean into deeper conversations. Vulnerability is your superpower rn.
daily.career: Your creative solutions are hitting different today. Don't sleep on that idea you've been sitting on—the universe is lowkey pushing you to speak up and share your perspective.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness and rest, not hustle. Gentle movement, hydration, and actually listening to what you need (not what you think you should do) is the vibe today.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your zone of introspection this week, Pisces. It's giving major clarity moments mixed with some needed solo time. Trust the quiet—your intuition's basically screaming right now, so listen up.
weekly.love: Venus is softly nudging you toward authenticity in connections. Whether you're coupled or exploring, this is about showing up as your real self, not the filtered version. Vulnerability hits different when it's genuine.
weekly.career: Your creative channels are buzzing with potential energy. This week favors bold ideas and unconventional approaches, even if they feel a little outside the box. Your unique perspective is literally your superpower rn.
weekly.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit overstimulated midweek—that's normal. Lean into grounding activities that feel nurturing: long showers, time near water, journaling. Your body's asking for softness, not intensity.
